faqs.question: 1. What exactly does Panorama Solutions do?
faqs.answer:
Panorama Solutions is a full-cycle technology consulting & product engineering firm.
We handle everything - from idea validation and system design to development, deployment, scaling, and long-term support.
Our services include:
  • Custom Software Development
  • Al & Automation Systems
  • Web & Mobile Applications
  • SaaS Platforms
  • Data & Process Digitization
  • Enterprise & Government Solutions
  • Ongoing Support & AMC
We don't just build software - we build working business systems.

faqs.question: 2. What is your "Free POC" and why do you offer it?
faqs.answer:
Our Free Proof of Concept (POC) is a risk-free way for clients to validate their idea before making any commitment.

Our approach:

Discuss → Build → Decide
  • Discuss (30-60 min): Deep problem & use-case understanding
  • Build: Our team builds a working POC
  • Decide: Continue, pivot, or drop → no obligation

We invest our effort first because we're confident in our engineering and problem-solving ability.

Several of our real platforms - including Al Law Assist, Land Marketplace, and NGO Systems - began as Free POCs.

faqs.question: 3. What type of projects do you specialize in?
faqs.answer:
We specialize in complex, high-impact systems, including:
  • Al-powered platforms (Law Assist, image recognition, automation)
  • Engineering & simulation software (Water purification design systems)
  • Government & NGO platforms (HRMS, case management, social programs)
  • Marketplaces & transaction platforms (land verification & trading)
  • Enterprise websites & SaaS products
Our portfolio includes real, large-scale production systems across law enforcement, NGOs, manufacturing, real estate, and government sectors.

faqs.question: 4. Do you only do development, or also planning and design?
faqs.answer:
We handle the entire lifecycle:
  • Business & technical consulting
  • Problem framing & system architecture
  • UI/UX design (Figma)
  • Full-stack development (Web, Mobile, Al)
  • Testing & deployment
  • Infrastructure & scaling
  • Long-term support, maintenance & AMC
Clients get one accountable technical partner instead of multiple vendors.

faqs.question: 5. How are you different from typical IT companies or freelancers?
faqs.answer:
Most vendors:
  • Start coding immediately
  • Sell fixed packages
  • Disappear after delivery
We:
  • Start with problem understanding
  • Validate ideas with Free POC
  • Design real business systems, not just apps
  • Deliver production-ready engineering
  • Offer long-term partnership & support
We operate as your technology co-founder, not just a service provider.

faqs.question: 6. Do you work with startups, enterprises, or government clients?
faqs.answer:
All of them.
Our clients include:
  • Startups & founders
  • SMEs & large enterprises
  • NGOs & international institutions
  • Law enforcement & government bodies
We tailor our approach to each organization's scale, compliance needs, and budget.

faqs.question: 7. How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer:
It depends on complexity, but typically:
  • POC: 1-4 weeks
  • MVP/Core System: 6-12 weeks
  • Enterprise Platform: 3-6+ months
We work in structured phases with clear milestones and approvals.

faqs.question: 8. Do you provide ongoing support after project delivery?
faqs.answer:
Yes.
We offer structured Support & AMC plans that include:
  • System monitoring
  • Bug fixes & improvements
  • Feature enhancements
  • Security & performance upgrades
  • Technical consulting
Your system continues evolving with your business.

faqs.question: 9. Can you modernize or rebuild existing systems?
faqs.answer:
Absolutely.
We frequently:
  • Re-engineer legacy systems
  • Migrate desktop systems to web & mobile
  • Improve performance & scalability
  • Add Al & automation layers
  • Redesign UI/UX for better conversion

faqs.question: 10. How do we start working with you?
faqs.answer:
Simple:
  • 1. Book a discussion
  • 2. Get your Free POC
  • 3. Decide your roadmap
No pressure. No risk.
Only clear engineering and honest advice.
